title: Sour Cream Pierogi with Gooey Sauce
description: A Chinese twist on the classic Ukrainian dish, featuring a creamy sour cream sauce and gooey filling.
instructions: 1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil.
2. Cook the pierogi according to package instructions.
3. In a small saucepan, heat the sour cream over medium heat.
4. Add the briny and gooey to the sour cream and stir until combined.
5. Serve the cooked pierogi with the sour cream sauce and enjoy!
6. If using Ukrainian seasoning, sprinkle on top of the pierogi for extra flavor.
